{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) is a professional recruitment agency and business support service dedicated to helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and busy professionals streamline their operations. We specialize in administrative support, customer service, social media management, recruitment assistance with onboarding, and business/company branding. Our mission is to help clients save time, enhance productivity, and build strong, recognizable brands while they focus on growing their businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Remote&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a performance-driven Digital Marketer to lead client acquisition efforts for our HR and recruitment services.
	&lrm;This role is focused on generating qualified business leads and converting them into paying subscribers.
	The ideal candidate understands B2B marketing, lead generation funnels, and performance tracking


Responsibilities


	&lrm;Develop and execute digital marketing campaigns focused on attracting and converting business clients.
	&lrm;Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns (Meta, Google, LinkedIn) to generate qualified B2B leads.
	&lrm;Build and manage lead funnels, including landing pages, email follow-ups, and conversion tracking.
	&lrm;Track and report key performance metrics, including leads generated, conversion rates, and client acquisition numbers.
	&lrm;Drive strategies that result in a minimum of five (5) new subscribing clients per month.


Requirements


	&lrm;Proven ability to generate and convert business leads.
	&lrm;Experience running and optimizing paid advertising campaigns (Meta, Google, LinkedIn).
	&lrm;Strong understanding of lead generation funnels, email marketing, and analytics.
	&lrm;Ability to work independently in a remote environment.
	&lrm;Strong communication, organization, and time management skills.


Salary
N80,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;avsabujahr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&lrm;",

Digital Marketer Job at Avocado Virtual Solutions




        
    

        
        Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) is a professional recruitment agency and business support service dedicated to helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and busy professionals streamline their operations. We specialize in administrative support, customer service, social media management, recruitment assistance with onboarding, and business/company branding. Our mission is to help clients save time, enhance productivity, and build strong, recognizable brands while they focus on growing their businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Remote 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a performance-driven Digital Marketer to lead client acquisition efforts for our HR and recruitment services.
	‎This role is focused on generating qualified business leads and converting them into paying subscribers.
	The ideal candidate understands B2B marketing, lead generation funnels, and performance tracking


Responsibilities


	‎Develop and execute digital marketing campaigns focused on attracting and converting business clients.
	‎Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns (Meta, Google, LinkedIn) to generate qualified B2B leads.
	‎Build and manage lead funnels, including landing pages, email follow-ups, and conversion tracking.
	‎Track and report key performance metrics, including leads generated, conversion rates, and client acquisition numbers.
	‎Drive strategies that result in a minimum of five (5) new subscribing clients per month.


Requirements


	‎Proven ability to generate and convert business leads.
	‎Experience running and optimizing paid advertising campaigns (Meta, Google, LinkedIn).
	‎Strong understanding of lead generation funnels, email marketing, and analytics.
	‎Ability to work independently in a remote environment.
	‎Strong communication, organization, and time management skills.


Salary
N80,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: avsabujahr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.‎    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "AI Engineering Tutor",
  "description": "Torilo is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI Engineering Tutor
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Role Schedule:&nbsp;2 days a week (10am - 2pm)

Job Description


	We&rsquo;re looking for a&nbsp;passionate AI Engineering Tutor to join our training team onsite and help shape the next generation of AI engineers.
	If you love breaking down complex AI/ML concepts into simple, practical lessons &mdash; this is for you!


Job Responsibilities


	TeachAI, ML, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, and MLOps in a hands-on, project-driven way.
	Mentor students through coding challenges and real-world projects.
	Simplify tough concepts so learners canapply AI in practice, not just theory.
	Keep classes fun, engaging, and up to date with the latest AI tools and trends.


Job Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Two to five years of work experience
	Must have a minimum of B.Sc Degree


Required Skills:


	Strong experience withPython, TensorFlow/PyTorch, and Data Science tools.
	Background in&nbsp;AI/ML model development &amp; deployment.
	Great at explaining technical concepts in a clear, engaging way.
	Prior tutoring/teaching experience is a plus, but not mandatory.
	Enthusiasm, patience, and a drive to see learners succeed.


Pay Budget
N30,000 weekly.",

AI Engineering Tutor Job at Torilo




        
    

        
        Torilo is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI Engineering Tutor
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Role Schedule: 2 days a week (10am - 2pm)

Job Description


	We’re looking for a passionate AI Engineering Tutor to join our training team onsite and help shape the next generation of AI engineers.
	If you love breaking down complex AI/ML concepts into simple, practical lessons — this is for you!


Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	TeachAI, ML, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, and MLOps in a hands-on, project-driven way.
	Mentor students through coding challenges and real-world projects.
	Simplify tough concepts so learners canapply AI in practice, not just theory.
	Keep classes fun, engaging, and up to date with the latest AI tools and trends.


Job Requirements & Qualifications


	Two to five years of work experience
	Must have a minimum of B.Sc Degree


Required Skills:


	Strong experience withPython, TensorFlow/PyTorch, and Data Science tools.
	Background in AI/ML model development & deployment.
	Great at explaining technical concepts in a clear, engaging way.
	Prior tutoring/teaching experience is a plus, but not mandatory.
	Enthusiasm, patience, and a drive to see learners succeed.


Pay Budget
N30,000 weekly.    

    

        Click here to Apply
